content: Implementing 'Add Template Path Transformation Support': adding optional path_transform param to loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only that file's loader classes. Let me know if you're also editing loaders.py.

agent2: ack, no conflict on my end — my workspace copy of loaders.py doesn't show your fallback_searchpath changes (looks like we have isolated working trees). I've added path_transform param to FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader — all tests pass. Writing patch.txt now.
